message:
fix(security): suppress clear-text sessionStorage CodeQL alerts (Fixes #9199) (#9201)

- Weather.tsx: add lgtm suppression + justification for city/location prefs
  (city names are not sensitive data)
- useCertManager.ts: add lgtm suppression + justification for cert metadata
  (names/expiry dates only; no private keys; sessionStorage clears on tab close)
- useDataCompliance.ts: add lgtm suppression + justification for compliance
  posture (aggregate counts/scores only; cleared on tab close)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
